items.name: Plurai
items.tagline: Vibe-train evals and guardrails tailored to your use case
items.description: Vibe training for AI agent reliability. Describe what your agent should and should not do — Plurai generates training data, validates it, and deploys a custom model in minutes. It feels like vibe coding, but for evaluation and guardrails. No labeled data. No annotation pipeline. No prompt engineering. Under the hood, small language models deliver sub 100ms latency, 8x lower cost than GPT as judge, and over 43% fewer failures. Always on, not sampled. Built on published research (BARRED).

items.name: Open Wearables
items.tagline: Open infrastructure for wearable-powered health products.
items.description: Build personalized health products with one API for every wearable. Access wearable data, open health scoring algorithms, and structured context your AI can reason with. Self-hosted, open-source, MIT licensed.

items.name: Gro v2
items.tagline: Spot signals, trigger outreach - turn posts into pipeline
items.description: Gro’s new Content Search + Social Signal Monitoring helps you find what your buyers are already talking about, identify the authors worth engaging, and then automatically monitor for new high-intent posts so you can respond the moment intent shows up (you see the post). When a matching post appears, Gro can trigger your playbook instantly: alert you, comment, send a connection request, and draft/send email/message — all from one workflow. From content → to leads → to monitoring → to action.

items.name: Netlify Database
items.tagline: Ship data-driven apps without breaking flow
items.description: Netlify Database is a fully managed PostgreSQL database that integrates seamlessly with your Netlify projects. It provides automatic database branching for deploy previews, built-in migration support, and a best-in-class local development experience.

items.name: KarmaBox
items.tagline: Run your own Claude Code in your pocket.
items.description: Run hundreds of AI agents from your phone. Turn your devices into a private compute pool, route every task to the best AI, and use Claude, Codex, Gemini and more — no infra, no lock-in.

items.name: CodeHealth MCP Server by CodeScene
items.tagline: Keep AI-generated code healthy and maintainable
items.description: CodeHealth MCP Server ensures agents and AI coding assistants write maintainable, production-ready code without introducing technical debt. Using deterministic CodeHealth feedback, it guides agents to spot risks, improve unhealthy code, and refactor toward clear quality targets. Run it locally and keep full control of your workflow while making legacy systems more AI-ready. The result is more reliable AI-generated code, safer refactoring, and greater trust in real engineering workflows.

items.name: UXPin Forge
items.tagline: Generate UI from your design system, not around it
items.description: AI that generates UI your design system would approve. Forge works inside UXPin with your real components—MUI, shadcn/ui, Ant Design, or your own—so you can iterate fast and ship clean JSX. No rebuilding, no workarounds.

items.name: Dreambase Data Agent Skills
items.tagline: Analytical skills for data agents running on Supabase
items.description: Today we're introducing Dreambase Skills, a composable layer that bundles your data sources (Supabase tables, Stripe, PostHog, any API or MCP), business logic, and visualization rules into reusable units our agents use to build accurate dashboards and reports. Onboarding scans your database and prepopulates Skills automatically. Coming soon via CLI, API, and MCP so other agents can consume them too.

items.name: Redesign by Nodewave
items.tagline: Free and open‑source, stop designing. Describe.
items.description: Redesign was born from a need to create branded and premium social media posts without a design background, a huge budget, or wasting hours trying to do something that should be effortless. We built it as an internal tool first. The trick: let Claude pull from our codebase, not generate from scratch. Hence the name, React + Design. We kept sharpening it week after week, adding new features, and now a post that took us a few hours takes a few minutes. We made it open-source, free for anyone.

items.name: Picsart CLI
items.tagline: Picsart's power right from your AI chat box
items.description: The Picsart CLI brings image, video, and audio generation straight to your terminal. One install gives you access to 140+ leading AI models across all three media types.
